arts.ttl: Wolves defeat will have key person at West Ham pushing for Julen Lopetegui’s sacking
arts.sum: Wolves’ 2-1 defeat to Ipswich Town on Saturday could have a big impact on West Ham as Gary O’Neil is facing the sack after the setback at Molineux. arts.ttl: West Ham star could provide Mikel Arteta with missing “spark” he needs in 2025
